summary: Lead accepts M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001 after replacement test_engineer R3, independent QA R2 ACCEPT, and lead integration gates. The branch adds a workspace-local @monsoon/sim-ai validation package, a headless M5 multi-year runner, deterministic test coverage, and audit handoffs. The live 730-day accepted-slice continuation explicitly reports zero accepted AI commands and 730 no-action decisions; this limitation is accepted for task-level validation and must remain visible in M5 gate evidence, not treated as active long-run AI strategy proof.

Final hash a83d87d8; schedule hash 1ddcf36b; trace hash 1811680d; no deadlock true; invariant failures 0; AI attempts 730; accepted commands 0; no-action decisions 730; no command rejections.
Architecture boundaries, determinism, root Vitest 35 files/249 tests, and web Vitest 1 file/4 tests passed.

decisions: Accept the pnpm-lock.yaml allowed-path correction because it only records workspace-local @monsoon/sim-ai links and no external dependency.
Accept the live no-action-only limitation only as explicit task-level validation evidence; carry it into M5 gate risks and do not claim active long-run AI strategy proof.
Do not broaden root format/lint globs in this task because package root/process script changes are outside current allowed paths; record as follow-up risk.
Do not mark CLOSED until PR CI passes, the branch enters main, and main is synchronized.

risks.risk: Live continuation records AI accepted commands: 0 and no-action decisions: 730; accepted as explicit validation limitation only.
Root pnpm format:check misses packages/sim-ai and apps/sim-runner/src; targeted formatting evidence is recorded, and a later process task should update root globs.

requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main on pass, then close M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001 and continue to the next READY M5 task.
